nasb.text: Then Jethro, Moses’ father-in-law, took a burnt offering and sacrifices for God, and Aaron came with all the elders of Israel to eat a meal with Moses’ father-in-law before God.

esv.text: And Jethro, Moses’ father-in-law, brought a burnt offering and sacrifices to God; and Aaron came with all the elders of Israel to eat bread with Moses’ father-in-law before God.

cnv.text: 摩西的岳父葉忒羅把燔祭和幾樣祭品拿來獻給　神；亞倫和所有以色列的長老都來到　神面前，與摩西的岳父一同吃飯。

ccb.text: 摩西的岳父叶忒罗说完，便向上帝献燔祭及其他祭物。亚伦和以色列的长老都来与他一起在上帝面前吃饭。
